NN_CORE_1_CNCTED_TO_CSP_SW 

LABEL: At Least 1 Core HRSN Connected to CSP, None Resolved 

DESCRIPTION: Navigation needs (NN): beneficiary had at least one navigated core health related social need 
(HRSN)connected to community service providers (CSPs); none resolved. 

LONG NAME: NN_CORE_1_CNCTED_TO_CSP_SW 

TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 1 

SOURCE: AHC data system (derived) 

VALUES: 0
